title: BASF Becomes First Producer of Renewable Ammonia in Central Europe
content: With two new renewable ammonia grades â€“ renewable ammonia and renewable ammonia solution 24.5% â€“ BASF further expands its sustainable product portfolio. BASF produces the renewable ammonia grades at its Verbund site in Ludwigshafen by feeding hydrogen into the ammonia plant which reduces the plantâ€™s natural gas consumption. The expansion of the ammonia portfolio is a further step on the sustainable journey of BASFâ€™s Monomers division
